lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and staining. Mechanical components are functional but will require maintenance soon.
Fair condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The body is well-maintained with only minor cosmetic wear and no major damage. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are reliable and have been regularly serviced. The interior is clean and shows some typical signs of use.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant investment to return to a reliable state. The exterior has multiple dents, faded paint, and visible rust on the lower panels. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there is a known transmission slip. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. This is a project car sold strictly as-is.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents, peeling paint, and areas of rust. The interior is also in rough shape with torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. While it currently starts and moves, it is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project car or for parts.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle offers a fantastic opportunity to own a stylish model at a budget-friendly price. It currently needs significant mechanical repairs and cosmetic work, making it the perfect canvas for someone looking to restore a car or use it for parts. Don't miss out on this affordable chance to start your next automotive adventure!

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in excellent mechanical order, it offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. The interior remains remarkably preserved, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. This offering stands as a testament to engineering integrity, providing a superior driving experience at an exceptional value. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the caliber of this motorcar firsthand.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of—perfect for someone who wants quality without the brand-new price tag. It handles beautifully and is just waiting for someone to take it home. Come check it out, you’re going to love it!

Used car in good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained car that balances performance with daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor signs of careful road use consistent with its age. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with premium leather upholstery that remains supple and supportive. Every electronic feature—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent professional inspection confirming the engine and transmission are smooth and responsive. The brakes were recently serviced, and the tires offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead. Complete with a clean title and a full folder of maintenance records, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring both mechanical reliability and a refined aesthetic. Featuring a well-preserved

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained, it exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Offering a balanced synthesis of performance and value, this selection has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous dealership standards. A sophisticated acquisition for those seeking proven reliability and refined comfort.

Hi everyone! I'm so excited to find a new home for my reliable car! It's been a fantastic companion and is still in wonderful shape, ready to hit the road whenever you are. It drives smoothly and has been taken care of really well. If you’re looking for a dependable ride that won't let you down, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, complete with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal power delivery. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and documented rear subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry remains true, providing the communicative steering and balanced chassis dynamics this platform is renowned for. While displaying minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the engine's compression is strong and the rod bearing service is up to date, making this a turn-key performance machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Solid runner.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, with only a few minor stone chips on the front bumper that are typical for its age. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the leather seats are supple and free of tears, though the driver’s side shows light, natural creasing. All electronic components, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service record and a recent multi-point inspection. With plenty of life left in the tires and brakes, this vehicle is ready for the road today.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, this unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its continued reliability. The interior remains exceptionally preserved, reflecting a history of careful ownership. With a proven track record of durability, this offering stands as a testament to engineering excellence, providing a sophisticated driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

This professionally maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. It exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, reflecting a history of diligent care. Prospective owners can expect a reliable, high-caliber driving experience from this distinguished selection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It’s been well-cared for and is ready for many more miles. Come take it for a spin, you'll love how it handles!

Offered is a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox to a GKN variable M-differential lock. The chassis benefits from preventative subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, ensuring neutral handling and high torsional rigidity. This example maintains its factory-spec suspension geometry and exhibits strong compression across all cylinders. While showing minor age-appropriate patina, the drivetrain remains robust and the throttle response is sharp, making it a prime candidate for the spirited driver.
Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs great. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep luster, though it shows minor signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin with leather upholstery that remains supple and supportive. All electronics, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has been serviced regularly with a recent oil change and tire rotation just completed. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts crisply, offering a confident driving experience. This is a reliable, attractive car ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently offered in commendable condition. Demonstrating a consistent history of mechanical care and aesthetic preservation, this unit represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. All primary systems have been thoroughly vetted to ensure standards remain high, making this an exceptional acquisition within its class.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, this model offers a sophisticated synthesis of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. A reliable and distinguished choice for those who demand quality and consistency in their automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Available is a driver-focused E92 M3, powered by the S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This unit is equipped with the lightning-quick M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring precise torque distribution. The chassis is bolstered by Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adaptive suspension response. Recent preventative maintenance includes throttle actuator service and a cooling system refresh. Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Recent service completed. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a brilliant luster, complemented by original alloy wheels with ample tire tread remaining. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the charcoal leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and trim remain in excellent shape. All electronic components, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in great health, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent fluid service. While there are minor signs of light use consistent with its age, such as a few faint stone chips on the front fascia, the car drives smoothly and shifts with precision. It is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and long-term reliability. Offering a superb balance of sophistication and value, this motorcar represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence and proven durability.
